headline: A Look At Seagate Technology (STX) Valuation After Strong AI Driven Earnings And HAMR Storage Momentum
summary: What Seagate’s latest earnings reveal about the AI storage story Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) just reported third quarter results that put a spotlight on how AI and data center demand are feeding into the business and, by extension, the stock. For the quarter ended April 3, 2026, Seagate reported sales of US$3,112 million compared with US$2,160 million a year earlier, and net income of US$748 million compared with US$340 million. Basic earnings per share from continuing operations came...

headline: Seagate CEO: Focused on providing supply predictability amid the data storage 'supercycle'
summary: Dave Mosley, chairman and CEO of Seagate says he is holding out hopes that demand for data storage at the edge through sovereign and neo clouds will return soon. He also adds that generative AI video applications, agentic AI, and physical AI are all helping to drive the data storage supercycle.
